final_output:
The rustle of leaves in a silent autumn wind whispered secrets to me, swirling tales of creatures long gone but not forgotten. They spoke of the slow dance of time on Earth – the rise and fall of giants that once walked this planet, leaving behind only whispers etched upon stone or carved into trees. 

It started as an itch under my skin - a yearning for something deeper than stories told in libraries, something more primal. The human thread pulsed beneath it all – not just the echoes of past

max.content: Evolution is a process of natural selection where organisms with traits better suited to their environment tend to survive and reproduce more often than those that do not have the same trait. This leads to changes in species over time, which can be seen through adaptations such as longer legs for running or stronger claws for hunting
